ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "healthcare_facilities" TEXT /* Number and type of healthcare facilities */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Economic indicators such as GDP, unemployment rate, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the observation was made */,
  "epidemic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemic */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on the observation date */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the observation date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the observation date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the observation date */,
  "log_confirmed" REAL /* Logarithmic transformation of confirmed cases */,
  "log_active" REAL /* Logarithmic transformation of active cases */,
  "days_since" TEXT /* Days since the first reported case */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week number of the year for the observation date */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Rate of testing per 1000 people */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations per 100,000 people */,
  "reproduction_number" REAL /* Reproduction number (R0) of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_epidemic_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemic_id") REFERENCES epidemics ("epidemic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemics" (
  "epidemic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the epidemic */,
  "epidemic_name" TEXT /* Name of the epidemic or outbreak */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the epidemic */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the epidemic (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the epidemic */,
  "virus_type" TEXT /* Type of virus causing the epidemic */,
  "transmissibility" REAL /* Rate of transmission of the disease */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of deaths among confirmed cases */,
  "control_measures" TEXT /* Measures taken to control the epidemic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epidemic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health officer, researcher) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., WHO, CDC) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, NGO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis tool (e.g., Tableau, R) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis tool */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., open source, commercial) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)
